Level_3: Documented, assigned, implemented, and periodically reviewed
Level_4: Demonstrated improvement, learning loop, or external/independent validation
Evidence_Minimum: E2 for Level 2; E3 for Level 3; E3/E4 for Level 4
Notes: Default rubric where no specific rubric exists

Level_2: Documented policy or responsibility but limited implementation
Level_3: Implemented governance with records and management review
Level_4: Governance updated based on measured performance and improvement outcomes

Level_3: Updated register with owner and periodic review
Level_4: Evidence of proactive update, closure, and prevention of recurrence

Level_3: Complete, traceable, and regularly reviewed data
Level_4: Data verified, analyzed, benchmark-ready, and used in decisions

Level_2: Baseline/current data available but limited attribution
Level_3: Comparable data with attribution and evidence
Level_4: Proven, normalized, and sustained improvement with feedback loop
Notes: Trend is not improvement without attribution

Level_2: High-risk suppliers identified or partially assessed
Level_3: Supplier impacts assessed and corrective actions tracked
Level_4: Supplier improvement or quantified impact demonstrated
Circularity outcomes demonstrated without burden shifting
